name: Parsley Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel a thin skin ring from the center of each potato.
2. Place potatoes on a steamer rack over boiling water. Cover and steam for 15 to 20 minutes, or until tender.
3. Drain the potatoes.
4. In a serving bowl, mix butter and chopped parsley.
5. Add the drained potatoes to the bowl.
6. Season with salt and pepper.
7. Toss and serve.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE
CAL: 106; CHO: 6mg; CAR: 19g; SOD: 83mg; FAT: 2g
